name: Kolachky Dough#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, cream cheese, butter, egg, sugar, and egg yolk in a large bowl until a dough forms.
2. Transfer the dough to a clean surface and knead gently until smooth.
3. Place the dough in an oiled container and cover with plastic wrap.
4. Refrigerate the dough overnight.
5. The next day, roll out the dough on a floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut into squares using a sharp knife.
7. Fill each square with your choice of walnut, lekvar (prune), poppy seed, or apricot filling.
8. Roll up each filled square tightly and place seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
9. Cover the kolachky loosely with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
10. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Bake the kolachky until golden brown, about 20-25 minutes.
12. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
